title: quoya dilatata
intro: Quoya dilatata, also known as the Quoya tree, is a plant species native to Australia, known for its unique and versatile properties. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its high concentration of alkaloids, which exhibit analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Quoya dilatata include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for treating various health conditions. Quoya dilatata can be prepared as a herbal infusion, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
intro_study: According to "Evidence-based complementary and alternative medicine : eCAM", Quoya dilatata (or Quercus dilatata) showed significant antinociceptive and anti-inflammatory activities, including a 66.7% edema inhibition in carrageenan assay, and a 60.4% inhibition in histamine assay.
